chair_snt_arc_consensus_actions.issue: Architect output was better at diagnosis than execution detail.
chair_snt_arc_consensus_actions.resolution: Keep the canonical execution spine and promote the architect's stronger truth upgrades into it.

chair_snt_arc_consensus_actions.issue: Future ARC handoffs can stop too early at architecture prose.
chair_snt_arc_consensus_actions.resolution: Require both architecture output and machine-execution output in future architect handoffs.

chair_snt_arc_consensus_actions.issue: SNT attacks were not frozen as mandatory categories.
chair_snt_arc_consensus_actions.resolution: Mandate founder-surface deception, transport truth, stale authority, and soft-acceptance attacks in all future SNT passes.
Studio must own founder-usability and interaction-quality artifacts for founder-facing surfaces.

chair_snt_arc_consensus_actions.issue: Lower-tier coder ambiguity remained too high.
chair_snt_arc_consensus_actions.resolution: Add default coder_must_not_decide boundaries and tighten step-level constraints.

chair_snt_arc_consensus_actions.issue: Better answers could remain in chat or side notes.
chair_snt_arc_consensus_actions.resolution: Promotion into canonical authority must be required or explicitly rejected with reason.
